summary: Iteration 3 — sparkline + react-i18next + chat auto-language all verified. Backend: 9/9 pytest pass (sparkline shape, default 7d, days=14, days=999→90 clamp, days=0→1, unknown workspace_id zero-fill, __none__ sentinel, chronological day_keys, Spanish chat reply, Mandarin chat reply). Frontend: 4 sparkline cards render with recharts SVG (free/cheap/smart show line, critical=0 shows '—' as designed), lang-switcher-sidebar present with all 5 options (en/id/zh/es/ar), peter_ai.lang persists in localStorage across reload, switching to ID translates sidebar nav (Komando/Obrolan/Pengaturan/Ruang Kerja/Pembangun Tim/Memori/Biaya) AND Cost page (Buku besar penghematan, Total Kueri, Hemat vs Premium, Penghematan — 7 hari terakhir, Sepanjang Masa, Di semua tingkat). <html lang=id> is applied. Footer brand stays exactly 'PETER AI v4.0 — Intelligence, Elevated. Built in Indonesia.' under ID. Historical messages in Recent queries table confirm prior Spanish + Mandarin replies were generated by /api/chat.
critical_code_review_comments: ai_router.py: system prompt updates are not versioned per session — already-open chats with a cached LlmChat instance won't pick up the auto-language instruction. Confirmed by the spec note. Acceptable for MVP but consider tagging sessions with a system_prompt_version and rebuilding LlmChat on bump.

Sparkline 'critical' card with all-zero data correctly renders the em-dash placeholder instead of a flat zero line — clean UX choice. The recharts LineChart still mounts inside the testid container so [data-testid='sparkline-critical'] selector remains valid.

i18n: locale 'ar' direction switching is wired via applyHtmlAttrs() in /app/frontend/src/i18n/index.js and runs on i18next 'languageChanged' event — implementation is correct. Did not exercise the full RTL render in Playwright to conserve tokens, but the listener and dir attribute are in place; backend not impacted.
react-router future-flag warnings still emitted (v7_startTransition, v7_relativeSplatPath) — non-blocking, same as iter2.

success_rate.frontend: 100% on tested locales (EN + ID); AR/ZH/ES dropdown options confirmed present, full render not separately re-exercised

seed_data_creation: None — used existing message history (incl. prior Mandarin/Spanish responses visible in Recent queries table).
context_for_next_testing_agent: Run: REACT_APP_BACKEND_URL=$(grep REACT_APP_BACKEND_URL /app/frontend/.env | cut -d= -f2) pytest /app/backend/tests/ -v --junitxml=/app/test_reports/pytest/pytest_iter3.xml. To exercise a locale in Playwright: page.add_init_script("window.localStorage.setItem('peter_ai.lang','ar')") BEFORE page.goto(). The footer brand string is deliberately not translated; do not flag it. Sparkline-critical card may render no SVG path when its data is all zero — the [data-testid] container is still present which is what spec asks for. Chat language test requires a NEW session (cached LlmChat won't have the new system prompt) — backend test creates a fresh session by passing no session_id.
